lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and requires major repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior has extensive damage including rust and dents, and the interior shows heavy wear.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any damage or imperfections. The interior is in original condition with no visible wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.

Experience perfection with this stunning, mint-condition vehicle! It has been kept in showroom quality, looking and driving as if it just rolled off the lot. Meticulously maintained and absolutely flawless, this car is a rare find for anyone seeking a like-new driving experience.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional, honest daily driver. The exterior shows visible signs of age, including several noticeable scratches on the body panels and some clear coat peeling on the roof. Inside, the cabin shows significant wear, with some staining on the carpets and a small tear in the driver's seat upholstery. While the car starts and runs reliably, it will soon require routine maintenance, specifically new brake pads and likely a set of tires. It is priced accordingly to account for these upcoming needs and its overall cosmetic state.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently has significant mechanical issues, including a slipping transmission and a persistent engine misfire that needs immediate professional attention. The exterior shows its age with noticeable rust along the rocker panels and several large dents on the passenger side. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with visible tears, and the air conditioning system is currently non-functional. This would be a suitable project car for an experienced mechanic or a candidate for parts salvage.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in pristine condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of automotive care, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a showroom-quality interior that reflects its low-mileage history. Meticulously inspected to ensure it meets our highest standards of excellence, this vehicle offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolute pristine condition—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve totally babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in the garage, and the paint is basically flawless. If you’re looking for absolute perfection, this is the one for you. You’ve really gotta see it in person to believe how gorgeous it is!

Offered is a museum-grade specimen featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. This unit boasts a flawless Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis is structurally perfect with documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing OEM+ components. Every VANOS component has been meticulously serviced to ensure optimal variable valve timing. Finished in concours-quality paint with a pristine interior, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering and mechanical purity.
Mint condition. Original paint. No scratches. Flawless interior. Full service records. Mechanically perfect.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive preservation with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is entirely free of blemishes, chips, or scratches. The paint depth and clarity are remarkable, complemented by pristine alloy wheels and a professional ceramic coating. Step inside to an interior that appears untouched; the premium leather seating is firm and flawless, the dashboard is free of any UV degradation, and every tactile surface feels brand new. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by master technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a comprehensive service portfolio included, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model. This is a rare opportunity to own a flawless, collector-grade vehicle that stands as a testament to pride of ownership.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that is strictly showroom-quality. Every detail, from the immaculate exterior finish to the preserved interior appointments, exemplifies excellence. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly flawless machine.

We are pleased to present an exceptional specimen preserved in peerless condition. This vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that mirrors its original factory specifications. Every detail has been meticulously curated to ensure an unrivaled driving experience. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the sophisticated buyer who prioritizes absolute quality and uncompromising preservation.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute gem of a car, and honestly, it’s in such incredible, mint condition you’d think it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, runs like a total dream, and looks stunning inside and out. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you! Come say hi and take it for a spin!

Offering a peerless E46 M3 in concours-level condition, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This example has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including a full double-VANOS overhaul, rod bearing replacement, and a reinforced rear subframe to ensure structural rigidity. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission shifts with clinical precision, paired with a perfectly calibrated M-variable limited-slip differential. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from refreshed bushings and factory-spec dampers, preserving the legendary 50/50 weight distribution. With original paint depth and an immaculate cabin, this vehicle represents a mechanically optimized, investment-grade driver's car.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Spotless interior. Mechanically perfect. All maintenance records available.

Step into a vehicle that defines automotive perfection. This showroom-quality masterpiece has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless factory finish and deep, mirror-like luster. The exterior is entirely free of even the smallest stone chips or blemishes, while the interior remains in pristine, untouched condition, retaining its original premium scent. Every surface, from the supple, unmarked leather seating to the high-definition digital displays, looks and functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a spotless engine bay and a whisper-quiet powertrain that delivers a smooth, exhilarating driving experience. With a comprehensive history of preventative maintenance and exceptionally low mileage, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a true time capsule. It is, quite simply, the finest example of its kind available on the market today.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle has been preserved in showroom condition, reflecting a meticulous maintenance history and an uncompromising commitment to aesthetic and mechanical excellence. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, confirms its status as a premier example of its class. We invite the discerning collector to experience a vehicle that delivers the presence and performance of a new acquisition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom state. This specimen represents a rare opportunity to acquire an automobile preserved with exacting care, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in pristine condition. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the highest benchmarks of automotive excellence. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning driver who prioritizes uncompromised quality and prestige.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this beauty—it is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition! I have babied this car from day one, and it still looks and drives just like it did the day I brought it home. It's super clean, incredibly reliable, and honestly feels brand new. I'm so excited for someone else to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have!

Offered is an exceptional, collector-grade E46 M3 in showroom condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 power plant, boasting individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned Double VANOS system for optimal torque delivery across the rev range. The mechanical integrity is absolute, featuring documented rod bearing replacement and a fully reinforced rear subframe. Power is transferred through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry remains laser-sharp with upgraded bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring the chassis dynamics are as telepathic as the day it left Regensburg. This is a turn-key, investment-grade example for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Single owner. Full service history. No scratches or dents. Interior remains like new.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained by a single enthusiast owner. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with no swirl marks, scratches, or stone chips, protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple with zero signs of wear on the bolsters, and the interior retains its original factory freshness. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documented exclusively through authorized dealerships. It has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover, never driven in inclement weather, and features a spotless undercarriage. Every electronic component, sensor, and luxury feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This sale includes all original keys, the window sticker, owner’s manuals, and a complete folder of maintenance receipts. For the discerning collector or buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this is an irreplaceable find.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit has been curated to meet the most exacting standards, exhibiting a flawless exterior and an immaculate cabin. Every mechanical component operates with precision, reflecting a history of rigorous care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this represents an unrivaled acquisition opportunity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this beauty. It’s been treated like family and is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—you won't find a single scratch on it! It drives like a dream and still feels brand new. I've taken such good care of it, and I'm looking for someone who will love it just as much as I have. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a meticulously maintained double-VANOS system. This example has undergone a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a full cooling system overhaul to ensure mechanical longevity. Power is delivered through a precise six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock, providing exceptional lateral grip and corner-exit traction. The chassis retains its factory-spec kinematic integrity, featuring fresh bushings and an uncompromised suspension geometry. The exterior finish displays remarkable depth with zero evidence of oxidation, while the cabin maintains its original matte leather texture and structural bolsters, reflecting its pristine, collector-quality status.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Low miles. No accidents. Service records available.

This 2018 Porsche 718 Cayman is the definition of a 'time capsule' vehicle. Finished in its original Guards Red paint, which has been professionally ceramic coated, the exterior is flawless with zero stone chips or swirl marks. It has been meticulously garage-kept under a breathable cover and has never seen rain. The interior features premium black leather that remains supple and matte, showing no signs of bolster wear or UV damage. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at an authorized dealership, with a complete binder of records included. Mechanically, it is indistinguishable from new; the engine is bone-dry, and the transmission shifts with precision. The 20-inch Carrera S wheels are free of any curb rash and are wrapped in recently fitted Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires. This is a collector-grade example for the discerning enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. A singular opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly flawless automobile, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class. We invite serious inquiries to experience this peerless example firsthand.
